apps.name: Game Hub
apps.description: Browse and play all your games in one place. Search, filter by category, and track your playtime.
apps.creator: abcatlmfao

apps.name: Minesweeper
apps.description: Classic grid-based puzzle game. Click cells to reveal numbers, flag mines, and clear the board without exploding!
apps.creator: abcatlmfao

apps.name: Sudoku
apps.description: Number puzzle game. Fill the 9x9 grid so that each column, row, and 3x3 box contains all digits from 1 to 9.
apps.creator: abcatlmfao

apps.name: Solitaire
apps.description: Classic card game. Build stacks of cards in descending order and alternating colors to win.
apps.creator: abcatlmfao

apps.name: Tetris
apps.description: Classic falling blocks puzzle game. Arrange shapes to complete lines and clear the board.
apps.creator: abcatlmfao

apps.name: Tic Tac Toe
apps.description: Simple two-player game. Get three in a row to win!
apps.creator: abcatlmfao

apps.name: Connect Four
apps.description: Classic disc-dropping game. Connect four of your discs in a row horizontally, vertically, or diagonally.
apps.creator: abcatlmfao

apps.name: Checkers
apps.description: Classic board game. Capture all of your opponent's pieces by jumping over them.
apps.creator: abcatlmfao

apps.name: Rock Paper Scissors
apps.description: Classic hand game. Play against the computer and try to win!
apps.creator: abcatlmfao

apps.name: The Factory
apps.description: All-in-one generator for jokes, quotes, facts, poetry, random numbers, and URL encoding.
apps.creator: abcatlmfao

apps.name: The Studio
apps.description: Creative suite with pixel art editor, photo editor (brightness/contrast), and color palette generator.
apps.creator: abcatlmfao

apps.name: Calculator
apps.description: Basic and scientific calculator. Switch between modes for different math operations.
apps.creator: abcatlmfao

apps.name: Weather
apps.description: Check current weather for any city. Uses real-time API data.
apps.creator: abcatlmfao

apps.name: Settings
apps.description: Customize your OS appearance and behavior.
apps.creator: abcatlmfao

apps.name: Fanter Studios
apps.description: Create your own games and apps with this visual editor.
apps.creator: abcatlmfao
